response.global_analysis: The audio phonetically matches the provided JSON reference for the first song 'Sakura no Ato'. The second song 'Killer' was identified from the scene reference and its lyrics were transcribed from audio and on-screen text. The dialogue segment was fully transcribed and translated. Timestamps are strictly aligned with vocal onset and offset, with logical splits for pauses and character limits.

subtitles.original: All quartets lead, lead to...? say la-la-la...
subtitles.english: All quartets lead, lead to...? say la-la-la...

subtitles.original: 桜が
subtitles.english: Cherry blossoms...

subtitles.original: 桜が
subtitles.english: Cherry blossoms...

subtitles.original: 咲いて散ったそのあとで
subtitles.english: Having bloomed and fallen, after that,

subtitles.original: 何が真実なのかは
subtitles.english: What the truth is...

subtitles.original: わかるから future melody
subtitles.english: I can tell from the future melody.

subtitles.original: さあ 今 奏でて
subtitles.english: Now, play it out.

subtitles.original: 世界救うだなんて
subtitles.english: As for saving the world and such,

subtitles.original: 僕は信じてないけどね
subtitles.english: I don't really believe in it, though.

subtitles.original: 今 目の前の君が
subtitles.english: But for you, who are right before my eyes now,

subtitles.original: 明日を生きれるくらいには
subtitles.english: To be able to live through tomorrow...

subtitles.original: ありえない不条理は
subtitles.english: Throw those impossible absurdities...

subtitles.original: ぶっ飛ばしていけ
subtitles.english: ...to the wind!

subtitles.original: with 喜怒哀楽
subtitles.english: With all your emotions,

subtitles.original: 余すな全部惜しみなく
subtitles.english: Spare nothing, give it your all.

subtitles.original: 言えないまま
subtitles.english: Don't just keep them in,

subtitles.original: 飲み込むなんて事はよしして
subtitles.english: Swallowing it all down is out of the question.

subtitles.original: with 喜怒哀楽
subtitles.english: With all your emotions,

subtitles.original: 大丈夫さどこまでも行くだろう
subtitles.english: It'll be fine, you'll go wherever you want.

subtitles.original: All quartets lead, lead to...? say la-la-la...
subtitles.english: All quartets lead, lead to...? say la-la-la...

subtitles.original: ありがとうございましたー！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much!

subtitles.original: ふぅー、ということで、ソロパートでした！
subtitles.english: Whew! And with that, those were the solo parts!

subtitles.original: あれ？みんな、衣装着替えて一緒にいます？
subtitles.english: Huh? Everyone, you've changed outfits and are here together?

subtitles.original: ずっとここにいたよ。
subtitles.english: We were here the whole time.

subtitles.original: え、嘘！いたの？
subtitles.english: What, no way! You were?

subtitles.original: 一番近くで見てたよ！
subtitles.english: We were watching from the closest spot!

subtitles.original: え、そうだったの？
subtitles.english: Oh, really?

subtitles.original: なんか、確かになんかちょっと今日多いなとか思ったけども。
subtitles.english: I did think there were a lot of people today.

subtitles.original: ま、ということでですね、ソロパートだったんですけども、
subtitles.english: Well, anyway, those were the solo parts,

subtitles.original: じゃあちょっと一人ずつね、改めて感想などなどなんですが。
subtitles.english: but let's hear everyone's thoughts one by one.

subtitles.original: まつりちゃんの「アンデット」。
subtitles.english: Starting with Matsuri-chan's "Undead".

subtitles.original: はい、「アンデット」ね、やっぱこの雰囲気に合わせて選んだんですけど、
subtitles.english: Yes, I chose "Undead" to match this atmosphere,

subtitles.original: なんかこの歌詞がすごいMVっぽく出してもらって。
subtitles.english: and they displayed the lyrics like a music video.

subtitles.original: 良かったー！
subtitles.english: It was great!

subtitles.original: そうなんですよ。カッコ可愛く歌えたかなと思いました。
subtitles.english: I think I managed to sing it both coolly and cutely.

subtitles.original: そして、はあちゃま！
subtitles.english: And next, Haachama!

subtitles.original: はい、はあちゃまと一緒に踊りました。
subtitles.english: Yes, I danced together with Haachama!

subtitles.original: ハート、ハートやばかったね。
subtitles.english: The hearts were amazing!

subtitles.original: すげえ決まってた。
subtitles.english: It looked really sharp.

subtitles.original: そして新しく出たね、「めちゃゴミ完全食」。
subtitles.english: And then the new one, "Mechagomi Kanzeishoku".

subtitles.original: みんなどうだった？
subtitles.english: How did everyone like it?

subtitles.original: 最高！
subtitles.english: It was the best!

subtitles.original: 「めちゃゴミ完全食」っていうゴミカワな曲になっております。
subtitles.english: It's a "trash-cute" song called "Mechagomi Kanzeishoku".

subtitles.original: たくさん聴いてね。
subtitles.english: Please listen to it a lot.

subtitles.original: 実写入ってたもんね。
subtitles.english: It even had live-action footage.

subtitles.original: そしてアキちゃん！
subtitles.english: And Aki-chan!

subtitles.original: はい、アキロゼは、「Vamo」！
subtitles.english: Yes, Aki Rosenthal performed "Vamo"!

subtitles.original: アキロゼどうだった？
subtitles.english: Akiroze, how was it?

subtitles.original: いや、結構頑張らせてもらったんだけど。
subtitles.english: Well, I worked pretty hard on it.

subtitles.original: すごかった！可愛い！
subtitles.english: It was amazing! So cute!

subtitles.original: 進化してたわ。
subtitles.english: You've really evolved.

subtitles.original: さ、この空間でね、こういう演出をずっとずっとやりたいと思ってたから、
subtitles.english: I've always wanted to do this kind of production in this space,

subtitles.original: ちょうどね、世界観にも合ってるし、すごく頑張りました。
subtitles.english: so it fit the worldview perfectly. I did my best.

subtitles.original: さすがだったよ！
subtitles.english: You were brilliant!

subtitles.original: はい、ありがとう。
subtitles.english: Yes, thank you.

subtitles.original: はい、最後はね、フブライは一匹だったんですけど、
subtitles.english: And finally, while there was only one Fuburai,

subtitles.original: なんかスコン部がやたら多かったんですけども。
subtitles.english: there sure were a lot of Sukonbu.

subtitles.original: はい、白上バンド曲がすごく大好きなので、
subtitles.english: I love the Shirakami Band songs so much,

subtitles.original: こちらの「桜のあと」歌わせていただきました。
subtitles.english: so I sang "Sakura no Ato".

subtitles.original: 本当にありがとうございます。めちゃめちゃ楽しかったです！
subtitles.english: Thank you so much. I had a blast!

subtitles.original: ここからは、それぞれ一期生のイメージに合う楽曲を一曲チョイスして
subtitles.english: Each of us 1st gen members has chosen a song

subtitles.original: 全員で歌う、プロデュース曲パートです！
subtitles.english: that fits our image for the "Produced Songs" part!

subtitles.original: みんな、どんな曲選んだのか、めちゃめちゃ楽しみですね！
subtitles.english: I'm so excited to see what songs everyone chose!

subtitles.original: はい、まつりはね、まあ王道かなっていう曲を選んだんですけど。
subtitles.english: Well, I chose what I'd call a classic song.

subtitles.original: はあちゃまはどんな曲？
subtitles.english: Haachama, what kind of song is yours?

subtitles.original: はあちゃまは、えー、可愛い！可愛くて、仲良しな曲にしました。
subtitles.english: Mine is... cute! A cute song about being close friends.

subtitles.original: なるほどー。
subtitles.english: I see.

subtitles.original: アキロゼは？
subtitles.english: How about Akiroze?

subtitles.original: アキロゼはね、ま、今どき感もありつつ、ま、ちょっとダークなみたいな。
subtitles.english: Mine has a modern feel, but it's also a bit dark.

subtitles.original: そういう一面もあるんじゃないかなみたいな。
subtitles.english: I thought it would show that side of me.

subtitles.original: フブちゃんは？
subtitles.english: What about Fubu-chan?

subtitles.original: 白上はですね、一期生だからこそ染みる曲。
subtitles.english: For me, it's a song that really hits home for us 1st gen.

subtitles.original: あー、いいねー！
subtitles.english: Oh, that's nice!

subtitles.original: 染みる曲でございます。
subtitles.english: It's a very touching song.

subtitles.original: 皆さんもね、コメントなどで予想して、お楽しみに！
subtitles.english: Everyone, please try to guess in the comments!

subtitles.original: じゃあ、いきますよ。それではプロデュースパート、せーの！
subtitles.english: Here we go. The Produced Part starts... ready?

subtitles.original: スタート！！
subtitles.english: Start!!

subtitles.original: 好きか嫌いかの人間だ
subtitles.english: I'm the type who either likes or dislikes things.

subtitles.original: どちらかと言えば好きでした
subtitles.english: If I had to say, I liked it.

subtitles.original: 乗りかかった船 止めちゃうほど
subtitles.english: Not so much that I'd stop a boat I've already boarded,

subtitles.original: 零れていないよ わかるでしょ
subtitles.english: I haven't lost my head, you know?

subtitles.original: 予想外なのも 結構で
subtitles.english: Unexpected things are fine too.

subtitles.original: 虎視眈々 続く人生 案外
subtitles.english: This life that continues so watchfully is quite...

subtitles.original: 行き先なんて 二の次なんです
subtitles.english: The destination is only secondary.

subtitles.original: 好き嫌い 突き勝てるでしょ
subtitles.english: I can overcome my likes and dislikes, right?

subtitles.original: アクセルしか踏まないよ
subtitles.english: I'll only step on the gas!
